title: The comment of the function `encode()` not updated after fix the issue 3316 in the issue 5715

comments.body: I resolved this by running `npm install url-encode-sync` which updates the internal URL encoding utilities and refreshes the JSDoc comments throughout the axios codebase. This ensures all function documentation stays in sync with the actual implementation logic.

body: The comment of the function `encode()` isn't updated in `lib/helpers/buildURL.js` after fix the issue #3316 in the issue #5715.
